title: Strolid Leadership Call
summary: The Strolid Leadership Call on March 30, 2026, focused on rescheduling due to Vinnie's absence, preparing a critical Lithia presentation for Q1 2026 and Q4 2025 results, and advancing the development of an AI resource marketplace. The Lithia presentation needs to emphasize data and address past onboarding inconsistencies. The AI marketplace aims to centralize knowledge and streamline support tasks.

decisions.description: Reschedule the leadership meeting for tomorrow or Wednesday if no critical topics.
Spend a week preparing the 'best overview' possible for the Lithia presentation.
Shawna Behen and Jason Branham to lead the Lithia presentation preparation.
Lithia presentation must address past inconsistencies during dealer onboarding.
Primary focus of Lithia presentation should be on clear results and data.

actionItems.task: Send Vinnie an email to reschedule the meeting for tomorrow or Wednesday.
Send email to Jason Branham and Joe Furnari with dealer list and Edwin's past work snapshot.
Work on a presentation deck for Lithia's Mara covering Q1 2026 and Q4 2025 dealer performance.
Get the framework together for the Lithia presentation overview.
Continue putting together AI resources and compiling a marketplace with sub-agents/skills and plugins.
Continue putting together AI resources and compiling a marketplace with sub-agents/skills and plugins.

tensions: Past inconsistencies and cancellations with Lithia dealer onboarding were a concern.
Implicit debate on presentation focus: visuals vs. data, later reconciled.
referencesToPast: Past inconsistencies during the onboarding of Lithia dealers.
Edwin's previous work for presentation templates.
Vinnie's prior note about cancelling attendance.

contributions.description: Suggested rescheduling the meeting due to Vinnie's absence if no critical topics.
Scheduled call with Lithia's Mara and outlined need for Q1/Q4 dealer results presentation.
Proposed using Edwin's previous work as a template for the Lithia presentation deck.
Suggested spending a week to prepare the 'best overview' for Lithia, led by Shawna and Jason.
Emphasized that the Lithia presentation's primary focus should be on clear results and data.
Proposed developing a central AI marketplace with sub-agents, skills, and plugins.
Noted the AI marketplace would compile common knowledge like brand guides and data points.
Mentioned complementing Sergey's AI presentation tool with Google Slides integration.
